title: Question: Verilator doesn't detect multiple assignment

features.name: same_reg_assigned_in_multiple_always_blocks
features.description: Code should include a reg signal assigned in two separate always @(posedge) blocks with complementary conditions

features.name: complementary_conditions_across_always_blocks
features.description: Code should include two always @(posedge) blocks with complementary conditions (a and !a) driving the same signal
features.snippet:
always @(posedge i_clk) if (cond) o_b <= 1'b0;
always @(posedge i_clk) if (!cond) o_b <= 1'b1;

features.name: conditional_assignment_in_multiple_always_blocks
features.description: Code should include a signal assigned conditionally in multiple always blocks where the conditions depend on another reg signal
